015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http;
018
019import java.io.*;
020
021import org.apache.juneau.http.entity.*;
022import org.apache.juneau.http.part.*;
023
024/**
025 * Static factory methods for creating common HTTP body types.
026 *
027 * <p>
028 * Import statically for clean DSL-style usage:
029 * <p class='bjava'>
030 *    import static org.apache.juneau.http.HttpBodies.*;
031 *
032 *    RestRequest <jv>req</jv> = client.post(<js>"/api/upload"</js>)
033 *       .body(stringBody(<js>"hello world"</js>, <js>"text/plain"</js>));
034 * </p>
035 *
036 * <p>
037 * <b>Beta — API subject to change:</b> This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack
038 * ({@code org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*}).
039 * It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the <b>next major</b> Juneau release
040 * (and possibly earlier).
041 *
042 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
043 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/NextGenRestClient">juneau-ng REST client</a>
044 * </ul>
045 *
046 * @since 9.2.1
047 */
048public final class HttpBodies {
049
050   private HttpBodies() {}
051
052   /**
053    * Creates a UTF-8 {@code text/plain} body.
054    *
055    * @param content The string content. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
056    * @return A new body. Never <jk>null</jk>.
057    */
058   public static StringBody stringBody(String content) {
059      return StringBody.of(content);
060   }
061
062   /**
063    * Creates a string body with a specific content type.
064    *
065    * @param content The string content. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
066    * @param contentType The MIME content type. May be <jk>null</jk>.
067    * @return A new body. Never <jk>null</jk>.
068    */
069   public static StringBody stringBody(String content, String contentType) {
070      return StringBody.of(content, contentType);
071   }
072
073   /**
074    * Creates a body backed by a byte array.
075    *
076    * @param bytes The byte content. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
077    * @return A new body. Never <jk>null</jk>.
078    */
079   public static ByteArrayBody byteArrayBody(byte[] bytes) {
080      return ByteArrayBody.of(bytes);
081   }
082
083   /**
084    * Creates a body backed by a byte array with a specific content type.
085    *
086    * @param bytes The byte content. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
087    * @param contentType The MIME content type. May be <jk>null</jk>.
088    * @return A new body. Never <jk>null</jk>.
089    */
090   public static ByteArrayBody byteArrayBody(byte[] bytes, String contentType) {
091      return ByteArrayBody.of(bytes, contentType);
092   }
093
094   /**
095    * Creates a body backed by a file.
096    *
097    * @param file The file. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
098    * @return A new body. Never <jk>null</jk>.
099    */
100   public static FileBody fileBody(File file) {
101      return FileBody.of(file);
102   }
103
104   /**
105    * Creates a body backed by a file with a specific content type.
106    *
107    * @param file The file. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
108    * @param contentType The MIME content type. May be <jk>null</jk>.
109    * @return A new body. Never <jk>null</jk>.
110    */
111   public static FileBody fileBody(File file, String contentType) {
112      return FileBody.of(file, contentType);
113   }
114
115   /**
116    * Creates a streaming body backed by an {@link InputStream}.
117    *
118    * @param stream The input stream. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
119    * @return A new body. Never <jk>null</jk>.
120    */
121   public static StreamBody streamBody(InputStream stream) {
122      return StreamBody.of(stream);
123   }
124
125   /**
126    * Creates a streaming body backed by an {@link InputStream} with a specific content type.
127    *
128    * @param stream The input stream. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
129    * @param contentType The MIME content type. May be <jk>null</jk>.
130    * @return A new body. Never <jk>null</jk>.
131    */
132   public static StreamBody streamBody(InputStream stream, String contentType) {
133      return StreamBody.of(stream, contentType);
134   }
135
136   /**
137    * Creates a URL-encoded form body from the given parts.
138    *
139    * @param parts The form parts. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
140    * @return A new body. Never <jk>null</jk>.
141    */
142   public static PartList formBody(HttpPart... parts) {
143      return PartList.of(parts);
144   }
145
146   /**
147    * Creates a URL-encoded form body from alternating name/value string pairs.
148    *
149    * @param pairs Alternating name/value strings. Length must be even.
150    * @return A new body. Never <jk>null</jk>.
151    */
152   public static PartList formBodyOfPairs(String... pairs) {
153      return PartList.ofPairs(pairs);
154   }
155}
